body.purpose: General body copy, lists, inputs, and forms.

motion.name: ease-out-strong
motion.purpose: Responsive spring-like UI exits and status changes.

components.name: Admin Panel
components.html:
Servicio Completado

Las uñas acrílicas se han registrado y se ha enviado la notificación de cuidados.
components.css: .ds-panel { background-color: #111111; color: #FAFAFA; border: 1px solid #27272A; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; } .ds-panel-title { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #FAFAFA; } .ds-panel-body { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #A1A1AA; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Call to action for key system operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #E11D48; color: #FAFAFA; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 24px; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #C0113A; }

narrative.overview: A premium administrative workspace designed to serve busy beauty salons and spas. The system uses a sleek, high-efficiency dark tech theme with vibrant rose pop highlights to reflect cosmetic creativity and operational energy.
keyCharacteristics: Sleek dark tech background (#0A0A0A) with rose pink accent (#E11D48)
Rounded layout panels (16px border-radius) with border frames (#27272A)

rules.name: The Rose Pop Rule
rules.body: Use the vibrant rose pop color strictly for interactive highlights, main buttons, and successful completed statuses.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Depth is achieved entirely through background color hierarchy.

dos: Do keep text line lengths under 75 characters for prose description block readability.
Do use text-wrap: balance on display headers to prevent awkward trailing words.
Do use high-contrast text (#FAFAFA) on all main headings.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders (e.g. border-left: 4px solid #E11D48) on panel headers or cards.
Don't apply gradients to text headers.
Don't use pure #000000 or generic slate-gray backgrounds.
